summary: Iteration 55 — Prontuário do Ativo (BR-01) fully validated. Backend 9/9 pytest PASS: GET /api/ativos/{id} returns identification (tag=BR-01, nome=BRITADOR, fabricante=ASTEC, sector=Britagem Primária) and KPIs (total_os, total_falhas, disponibilidade_percent, mtbf_horas, mttr_horas) with correct types/ranges; GET /api/ativos/{id}/saude returns all 7 expected keys (ultima_inspecao, proxima_inspecao, ultima_preventiva, proxima_preventiva, ultima_lubrificacao, ultima_os, ultima_anomalia); BR-01 has a pending proxima_inspecao with valid date; 404 on unknown ativo; 401/403 without auth; BR-01 exposes 3 aprovado plans (mecanica/eletrica/lubrificacao) via /planos-inspecao/por-ativo/{id} and >=1 open OS. Frontend 27/27 UI checks PASS on /ativos/025260b9-e541-4745-9100-e5110efb8155 as master: header shows 'Prontuário do Ativo' + TAG BR-01 + status operacional + BRITADOR + Área Britagem Primária + Tipo BRITADOR DE MANDIBULA + Fabricante ASTEC + Modelo 2238 + QR Code d5729e51; 4 KPI cards (Total OS=2 / Falhas=0 / Disponibilidade=100% / MTBF=0h); Saúde do Equipamento renders all 8 cards (última/próxima inspeção, última/próxima preventiva, última lubrificação, última OS, última anomalia, MTTR) with pending 01/07/2026 shown for próxima inspeção; Planos Permanentes (3) shows Mecânica/Elétrica/Lubrificação cards with disciplina badge + aprovado status + '10q • v1' / '8q • v1' / '7q • v1' meta; OS em Aberto lists 2 corretiva OS (#2026-00018, #2026-00009) with priority bar (Alta) and Aberta badge; Últimos Eventos preview shows timeline entries with icons and dates plus 'Ver todos' link; all 6 tabs (Prontuário/Timeline/Planos/OS/Docs/BOM) navigate and reveal their panels; Timeline tab shows date separators ('QUA., 1 DE JUL.') + 11 events + tipo/status filter selects; Planos tab lists 3 approved plans with disciplina/versão/perguntas; Docs tab shows manual upload; BOM tab shows add materials CTA.

issues: 7 of 8 saúde cards show 'Nenhum registro' for BR-01 (only Próxima Inspeção has data). This is functionally correct given seed state, but the sea of empty cards weakens the 'health at a glance' pitch. Consider showing subdued/collapsed cards or a compact bar when zero events exist for a category.

OS tab renders the 2 open OS but grouping headers for 'Em Execução' and 'Concluídas' were not detected in DOM (only 'Aberta' status appears). Because BR-01 has no OS in those buckets today, cannot confirm the grouped-by-status layout advertised in the spec — please verify with a manual walkthrough when other statuses exist, or hide/collapse empty groups explicitly.
Nº Série renders as em-dash '—' when null — visually OK, but consider adding tooltip 'Não informado' for accessibility.

action_items: OPTIONAL polish: Collapse or dim Saúde cards showing 'Nenhum registro' to reduce visual noise on assets with sparse history.

OPTIONAL: Verify OS tab renders explicit group headers 'Em Aberto / Em Execução / Concluídas' — currently only Aberta rows visible because BR-01 has no other statuses (spec bullet #13). Hide empty groups OR always render zero-state headers.
OPTIONAL (carryover from iter54): Add search/filter on Planos de Inspeção list; fix hydration warning at App.js:6978.
OPTIONAL: The saude endpoint duplicates the last/next helper logic inline for preventivas — consider unifying into the get_last / get_next_pending helpers to reduce drift.
critical_code_review_comments: assets.py GET /api/ativos/{id}/saude is well-factored with tiny helpers (get_last, get_next_pending, format_event) and correctly excludes lubricação from generic inspection query — good.
MTBF formula uses fixed 720h denominator (assumed monthly operational hours) — document this assumption or derive from ativo.horas_operacionais_mes if that field exists.

disponibilidade formula guards against div-by-zero with the (mtbf+mttr)>0 check — good, but returns 100% when both are zero, which conflates 'no data' with 'perfect'. Consider returning null and letting UI render '—'.

AtivoDetailPage (App.js line 2731) — component now >500 lines; six tab panels + BOM modal + dup modal are all inline. Extract each tab panel into a separate component to bring App.js file size under control (currently 8628 lines).
Prontuário header uses api.get('/ativos/{id}/manuais') separately even though ativo detail response could embed the count — minor perf nit, N+1 style.
seed_data_creation: None. Used existing homologacao seed from iter54. BR-01 ativo_id=025260b9-e541-4745-9100-e5110efb8155 has: 3 aprovado plans, 2 open corretiva OS (#2026-00018, #2026-00009), 11 timeline events, 1 pending inspection (01/07/2026).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Sprint 55 Prontuário do Ativo fully validated end-to-end. Both new endpoints (/api/ativos/{id}/saude and KPIs on /api/ativos/{id}) work correctly. Frontend AtivoDetailPage renders Prontuário header + KPI strip + 4 sections (Saúde, Planos Permanentes, OS em Aberto, Últimos Eventos) + 6 tabs. No functional bugs found. Only optional polish items around zero-state visuals. AtivoDetailPage component starts at App.js:2731 and is very long — recommend splitting for maintainability. Direct navigation URL for master validation: /ativos/025260b9-e541-4745-9100-e5110efb8155.
rca_of_the_issue: N/A — no bugs. Sprint 55 lands cleanly. The only minor testing wrinkle: `Locator.inner_text()` returns CSS-`text-transform: uppercase` transformed text; used `inner_html()` instead for case-preserving assertions.
